seo.title: Setu POS | Restaurant management software
seo.description: Setu POS is restaurant management software for billing, kitchen workflow, table management and multi-outlet operations — built for India and Southeast Asia.

hero.headline: Restaurant management, done right
hero.subheadline: Billing, kitchen workflow, table management, multi-outlet dashboards, customer management, coupons and a built-in tax engine — everything a restaurant needs to run smoothly, from a single outlet to a full chain.

features.heading: Multi-outlet dashboard
features.body: See sales, orders and performance across every outlet from one screen — no more chasing spreadsheets from each location.

features.heading: Kitchen workflow & order routing
features.body: Orders route straight to the right kitchen station, cutting mistakes and ticket time during rush hour.

features.heading: Table management
features.body: Track table status in real time — open, occupied, billed — so your floor staff always know what's happening.

features.heading: Tax-ready billing engine
features.body: Compliant billing out of the box, built for how tax actually works for restaurants in India and Southeast Asia.

features.heading: Customer management & QR tracking
features.body: Build a customer base automatically with QR-based ordering and repeat-visit tracking.

features.heading: Coupons & discounts
features.body: Run promotions and loyalty offers without juggling a separate tool.

cta.headline: See Setu POS running in your restaurant
cta.subtext: Book a free 30-minute demo and we'll walk you through billing, kitchen workflow and multi-outlet reporting.
